keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Own Goal by Cameron Burgess, Australia. USA 1, Australia 0.
Jordan Bos (Australia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Alessandro Circati (Australia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Paul Okon-Engstler (Australia).
Delay in match because of an injury Alex Freeman (USA).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Goal! USA 2, Australia 0. Alex Freeman (USA) header from very close range to the bottom right corner following a set piece situation.Goal awarded following VAR Review.
First Half ends, USA 2, Australia 0.
Substitution, Australia. Jason Geria replaces Cameron Burgess.
Substitution, Australia. Connor Metcalfe replaces Nishan Velupillay.
Substitution, Australia. Nestory Irankunda replaces Mohamed Touré.
Second Half begins USA 2, Australia 0.
Delay in match because of an injury Alessandro Circati (Australia).
Delay in match because of an injury Folarin Balogun (USA).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Antonee Robinson (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match because of an injury Mathew Leckie (Australia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Australia. Cristian Volpato replaces Mathew Leckie because of an injury.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, USA. Sebastian Berhalter replaces Ricardo Pepi.
Substitution, Australia. Jackson Irvine replaces Paul Okon-Engstler.
Substitution, USA. Joe Scally replaces Sergiño Dest.
Substitution, USA. Auston Trusty replaces Antonee Robinson.
Harry Souttar (Australia) is shown the yellow card.
Folarin Balogun (USA) is shown the yellow card.
Jacob Italiano (Australia) is shown the yellow card.
Chris Richards (USA) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match (USA).
Delay in match (Australia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, USA. Haji Wright replaces Folarin Balogun.
Substitution, USA. Giovanni Reyna replaces Weston McKennie.
